title: Compilation hangs when a generate loop is used with -- applied to genvar

features.name: generate loop with genvar decrement and >= condition
features.description: Code should include a generate block with a for loop using decrement operator (--) on a genvar with a >= comparison to 0

features.name: genvar decrement below zero causing wraparound
features.description: Code should include a genvar that is decremented past zero, causing unsigned wraparound behavior in a generate loop condition
